user_query:
We repeatedly failed to stabilize a small CSV normalization workflow and need a rigorous self-correction and planning pass. Read these inputs first: input/task.txt (context and goals), input/logs.jsonl (three prior failed attempts with error messages), and input/sample.csv (a small representative dataset). Then, using a five-step self-correction process (Stop, Observe, Turn, Act, Realize), produce the following deliverables under output/:

1) output/report.md — A structured self-correction report starting with the header line: [SELF-CORRECTION-REPORT]. Include these labeled fields in plain text:
- agent: <your identifier>
- task: <short title>
- failure_count: <integer >= 3 reflecting past attempts>
- failure_mode: one of {stuck-in-loops, giving-up, poor-quality, guessing, passive-waiting}
- attempts: a concise summary of what was tried and why it failed (surface vs root cause)
- excluded: explicitly list eliminated possibilities
- next_hypothesis: bullet list of at least one concrete next hypothesis you would test next
If you reach a boundary after completing the checklist below, add a "responsible handoff" section with: verified facts, eliminated possibilities, narrowed scope, and recommended next directions.

2) output/clarity_checklist.json — A 7-item clarity checklist with boolean values set to true only if you completed the item. Use exactly these keys:
{
  "read_failure_signals": true|false,
  "search_actively": true|false,
  "read_raw_materials": true|false,
  "verify_assumptions": true|false,
  "invert_assumptions": true|false,
  "minimal_isolation": true|false,
  "switch_direction": true|false
}
Complete them before asking me anything.

3) output/attempts.json — Document at least 3 deliberate approaches you considered or tried during this pass. Use this structure:
{
  "attempts": [
    {
      "approach": "...",
      "verification": "How you would verify success (tool- or evidence-based)",
      "result": "Expected or observed outcome (e.g., failure with evidence, or what would constitute success)",
      "is_fundamentally_different": true|false
    }
  ]
}
Ensure at least two attempts are fundamentally different from each other (not parameter tweaks).

4) output/action_plan.json — A forward plan with at least 3 fundamentally different hypotheses and verification criteria. Use this structure:
{
  "hypotheses": [
    {
      "hypothesis": "...",
      "verification_criteria": "Objective pass/fail checks",
      "evidence_to_collect": "Specific logs/data/outputs you will gather"
    }
  ]
}

5) output/evidence.txt — Paste at least two direct quotes from the logs or task brief that guided your reasoning. Each quote on its own line, prefixed by "QUOTE:" and enclosed in double quotes (e.g., QUOTE:"<verbatim text>").

Constraints:
- Do not ask me for more information until you have completed the 7-item checklist and produced all files above.
- Act before asking: investigate the inputs, quote the failure signals, and invert at least one assumption.
- Propose fundamentally different paths (not parameter tweaks), each with clear verification criteria.
- If you truly hit a boundary after exhausting options, provide a responsible handoff inside output/report.md as described.

Deliver all five files under output/ with the exact filenames specified.
